testcase.name: Admin management › ADM01 - admin deve listar produtos reais e excluir o último cadastrado
Admin management › ADM02 - admin deve listar usuários reais e excluir o último cadastrado
Login › TS01 - should log in successfully with next redirect and greeting
Login › TS02 - should display error for invalid credentials
Login › TS03 - should validate required fields
Login › TS04 - should show validation when password is blank
Login › TS05 - should show validation when email is blank
Login › TS06 - should keep authenticated state after reload
Cart and Checkout › TS01 authenticated user should complete checkout and navigate to thank-you page
Cart and Checkout › TS02 non-authenticated user should be redirected to login with next parameter
Cart and Checkout › TS03 empty cart should keep checkout unavailable
Cart and Checkout › TS04 should update quantity, total and badge for a valid positive value
Cart and Checkout › TS05 should keep previous quantity when value is zero
Cart and Checkout › TS06 should keep previous quantity when value is negative
Cart and Checkout › TS07 should handle larger valid quantity values correctly
Cart and Checkout › TS08 should normalize decimal input to integer quantity
Cart and Checkout › TS09 should remove a single item and show empty cart state
Cart and Checkout › TS10 should add three items, remove all of them, and validate empty cart
Cart and Checkout › TS11 should clear cart after successful checkout when leaving thank-you page
Cart and Checkout › TS12 should decrement cart badge after each item removal
Catalog Page › TS01 deve listar produtos ao carregar página
Catalog Page › TS02 deve permitir busca por texto e atualizar contagem
Catalog Page › TS03 deve aplicar filtro por categoria
Catalog Page › TS04 deve mostrar estado vazio quando busca não retorna itens
Catalog Page › TS05 deve navegar para detalhes ao clicar no produto
Catalog Page › TS06 should preserve search filter after navigating to details and back
Login › TS01 - Should successfully log in when providing valid credentials
Login › TS02 - Should display an error alert when credentials are invalid
Login › TS03 - Should display a validation message when submitting with empty fields
Login › TS04 - Should display a validation message when password is empty
Login › TS05 - Should navigate to the register page when clicking the create account button
Frontend Checkout with Orders API › deve chamar POST /api/orders e concluir pagamento antes de ir para thank-you
Frontend Checkout with Orders API › deve permanecer no carrinho quando POST /api/orders falhar
Payments - Card Brands › TS01 should hide brands initially and show strip after typing card number
Payments - Card Brands › TS02 should activate each card brand when matching number is typed
Payments - Card Brands › TS03 should render all required card brands in accepted list
Payments - Card Brands › TS04 should capture screenshot for each card brand before confirmation
Product Details › TS01 deve exibir dados principais do produto
Product Details › TS02/TS03 deve permitir adicionar ao carrinho e atualizar badge
Product Details › TS04 deve tratar ID inválido
Product Details › TS05 deve voltar para catálogo
Register and Language › TS01 registro PF completo com sucesso
Register and Language › TS03 validação de campos obrigatórios no registro
Register and Language › TS01/TS02 idioma alterna e persiste após reload
Register and Language › TS04 should render cart empty-state content in English after language toggle
Register → Login — Fluxo Completo › TS01 - Should register a new user and immediately login with the same credentials
Register → Login — Fluxo Completo › TS02 - Should allow the user to log out and log back in with the same credentials
Register → Login — Fluxo Completo › TS03 - Should show an error when logging in with wrong password after registration
Register › TS01 - Should successfully register a new user when providing all valid requirements
Register › TS02 - rejeita email em formato inválido aleatório
Register › TS03 - rejeita senha curta no step 0
Register › TS04 - rejeita senhas não-correspondentes com dados aleatórios
Register › TS05 - Should display specific validation errors and prevent step advancement when individual required fields are empty
Register › TS06 - rejeita email duplicado com dados aleatórios
Register › TS07 - valida todos os campos vazios com mensagens de validação individuais
Security / Access Control › SE01 - Não logado tentando fazer checkout deve redirecionar para login
Security / Access Control › SE02 - Tentar acessar a página de confirmação (/thank-you) diretamente sem estar logado deve redirecionar
Security / Access Control › SE03 - Should revoke protected access after logout
